description_long: This backpack features a rectangular, structured body with a predominantly teal green color accented by yellow straps and black side panels. The front displays a large patch with the Invicta logo, a circular emblem, and the word 'Magnum' embroidered near the bottom. Two wide, adjustable yellow straps with plastic buckles run vertically down the front, and a sturdy yellow handle is attached at the top. The sides are emblazoned with the bold 'invicta' text in black, and the back is ergonomically padded with two wide, patterned shoulder straps for comfort. The overall design is sporty and urban, with visible stitching and reinforced areas for durability.
description: A structured teal green backpack with yellow straps, black accents, and prominent Invicta branding, featuring ergonomic padding and bold decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Invicta logo patch, yellow straps with buckles, and 'Magnum' embroidery at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large 'invicta' text and the side profile of the yellow straps.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the padded ergonomic back panel and two wide, patterned shoulder straps.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with the 'invicta' text and side profile of the straps visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular Invicta logo patch is prominently displayed on the upper front, featuring a red and blue emblem with the word 'Invicta' in red text. The patch is rectangular with rounded corners and is sewn onto the backpack.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, padded, adjustable shoulder straps with a teal and white diagonal stripe pattern and 'Invicta' branding; one yellow top handle; yellow front straps with plastic buckles.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment accessed from the top/front flap; no visible side, front, or mesh pockets.
attribute_decorative_elements: Large 'invicta' text on both sides, Invicta logo patch on the front, 'Magnum' embroidery at the bottom front, and contrasting stitching throughout.
